_whisper_note: ggml-small.bin recommended for Spanish (244MB, much better accuracy). ggml-base.bin works but is less accurate.
_audio_note: silence_threshold: RMS floor for speech detection. Raise if ambient noise triggers endless recording. noise_floor_multiplier: adaptive multiplier over sampled room noise (default 2.0). Raise silence_duration if speech cuts off too early.
_wake_note: use_wake_word: false = Enter/PTT only (recommended for testing). Set true to enable 'hey axis' wake word.
